temporal_description: A close-up, low-angle shot focuses on a dark wooden table in a dimly lit room. Several old-fashioned, silver flip phones are scattered across the surface. In the background, the out-of-focus figures of people stand on either side of the table. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner. The camera is static, creating a tense and focused atmosphere. The audio opens with a tense, rhythmic, and slightly percussive instrumental track that creates a suspenseful and serious mood. The camera pans up slightly and shifts focus to a group of men standing in a tight space. The central figure is an older man with short, graying hair, wearing a light gray suit jacket over a light blue collared shirt. He is handed a brown envelope by someone off-screen. To his left, a younger man in a black shirt and a silver necklace looks on. The background is dark and indistinct, with cool, greenish lighting casting shadows. The "风行网" watermark remains in the upper left. A man speaks in a calm and direct tone, saying, "大哥，你的" (Big brother, this is yours). His voice is steady and matter-of-fact, as if making a simple, direct statement in a serious or formal context. The older man takes the envelope, opens it, and looks down at its contents. He then looks up and to his right, his expression serious and contemplative. The younger man beside him continues to watch him. The camera remains steady, maintaining a medium shot on the men. The suspenseful music continues to play in the background, maintaining the scene's tense atmosphere.
